positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a floating bouquet of bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central arrangement features exotic, stylized tropical flowers (like stylized lotuses and heliconia) interspersed with crystalline, glowing insects and delicate leaf structures. The color palette should be deep sapphire blue, electric teal, vibrant magenta, and soft neon yellow against a dark, cosmic void background. The composition must be perfectly centered, featuring strong, clean silhouettes and geometric balance, ideal for repeating patterns or single placement apparel art. Rendered in a vibrant, glowing ink style with high contrast and sharp vector quality. Concept: Celestial Botany. Style: Modern mystical, abstract illustration, clean vector art, maximalist flora.
